message:
test: add security tests for WriteFile permissions in doctor command (bd-ee1)

Add permission verification tests for EnsureProjectGitignore (0644 for
project .gitignore) and CheckPermissions (0600 temp file + cleanup).
Also add template content safety check for sensitive keywords.
